meaning: n.气囊,<美俚>废话连篇的人
examples: This is Mrs Gasbag. She lives next door to the Clarks.
Narrator: Mrs Gasbag and Mrs Dumpling have just met in the street.
High-performance gasbag shock absorber, to various reports, reducing the bump fatigue discovery.
Among its many innovations were engines that could, with the throw of a lever, be run either off gasoline or off hydrogen inhaled straight from the gasbag.
